In FY26, ASU and Amkor Technology Arizona Achieved the Most Significant Milestone

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

In FY26, ASU and Amkor Technology Arizona achieved the most significant milestone in the partnership to date by finalizing a CHIPS Act intermediary agreement. The agreement positions ASU as the workforce intermediary supporting Amkor’s $7 million workforce development strategy, including coordina...
